topic: My phone's front camera turns on by itself at night and records the ceiling above my bed.
title: My Phone Records My Ceiling Every Night While I Sleep | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My phone records the ceiling above my bed every night while I sleep.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone propped on a nightstand, front camera facing up, faint recording light on, dark bedroom, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I found dozens of videos I never made.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone screen showing a long list of unnamed video files, blue glow in a dark room, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each one starts at three in the morning.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone clock reading the dead of night, dim screen light, fog, film grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every clip is just my ceiling, grey and still.
scenes.image_prompt: a plain bedroom ceiling filmed from below, faint shadows in the corners, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then I watched one all the way through.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand holding a phone close in darkness, video of a ceiling playing, tense glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At the eight minute mark, a shadow leaned into frame.
scenes.image_prompt: a ceiling on a phone screen with a dark shape entering from the edge, deep shadow, fog, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I set my own camera to watch the next night.
scenes.image_prompt: two phones on a nightstand facing the bed, recording lights glowing, dark room, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Both phones caught it. The same shape. The same time.
scenes.image_prompt: a split of two identical dark ceiling videos on two screens, matching shadow shape, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The shape leans closer to where my face would be.
scenes.image_prompt: a dim ceiling video, a dark silhouette bending low over the camera, heavy shadow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the recording ended with my own eyes open, staring up.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone screen frozen on a dark frame from a low angle near a pillow, faint reflection, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I do not remember waking up at all.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty rumpled bed in grey dawn light, phone on the nightstand, low light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But in every clip, I am awake before the shape arrives.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark bedroom from a low ceiling angle, faint outline of an awake figure in bed, fog, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
